review_contract.target_scope: Codex model catalog resolution, argv construction, dispatch fallback, reports and telemetry

threat_surfaces.skip_reason: The feature does not ingest model output or third-party prose into parent-agent memory; the generated execution contract carries only sanitized resolution metadata.

evidence: Codex adapter keeps shell:false and model/effort in separate argv entries.
Model slugs from catalog are allowlisted by SAFE_MODEL_ID.
Model input is capped at 200 characters in schema and resolver; catalog cardinality is capped at 1000 before matching.
Attempt metadata is frozen in state and reports bind run_id, attempt_id, requested/resolved model, strategy and effort.
Manifest schema rejects unknown/secret fields; ambiguous or unsupported resolution blocks before adapter build/spawn.
Harness AC-AEMR-14 includes report, CLI, telemetry and verification-plan probes.
Catalog loader returns only sanitized slug/display/effort fields and never returns its filesystem path.
Telemetry bridge recursively redacts and bounds event payloads; raw catalog and prompts are not persisted.
Resolution never authorizes a provider/host switch; capacity fallback remains explicit and cross-host fallback is opt-in.

findings.title: Unbounded model name and catalog cardinality can exhaust resolver resources before spawn
findings.hypothesis: A very long manifest model value or a high-cardinality local cache drives tokenization and a Damerau-Levenshtein matrix for every eligible model without an input/cardinality cap.
preconditions: Attacker or faulty local process can modify the feature execution manifest or Codex models cache.
AIOSON validate/show/dispatch processes the crafted value.
reproduction_steps: Set an agent model to a very long non-matching string or supply a bounded-size cache with thousands of unique safe slugs.
Observe work scales with requested length times candidate count before any process is spawned.
evidence: src/agent-execution/schema.js validates only non-empty model strings and has no maximum length.
src/agent-execution/model-catalog.js bounds bytes but does not bound parsed models[].length.
src/agent-execution/model-resolver.js allocates a distance matrix per eligible candidate.
findings.impact: Local CLI denial of service through excessive CPU or heap pressure during validation/dispatch.
findings.suggested_fix: Cap model input length in schema and resolver, cap/reject catalog cardinality before sanitization/matching, and add negative tests for both limits.
fix_evidence: src/agent-execution/schema.js enforces MAX_MODEL_NAME_LENGTH on primary and fallback entries.
src/agent-execution/model-resolver.js rejects oversized input before tokenization/distance allocation.
Harness 12/12 and focused security-bound tests pass on 2026-07-11.
